channel.title: Supreme Court on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Supreme Court on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Even God can't help !
item.description:
See what Supreme Court has to say about the people overstaying in Govt accommodations.

In India, even God is helpless

Comments

Comment by amritpal singh on 2008-08-14 23:40:12 +0530

God will never be helpless, ena sarean di class lauga rabb tika ke, time time di gal hai

ena da v time auga

Comment by Sidhu on 2008-08-18 20:59:02 +0530

God knows…

Rabb di chakki chaldi hauli hai par peesdi bareek hai is useless these days.
